goal: Implement Mapping Engine - Phase 2 refined plan after Stitch redesign

prerequisites.backend_pattern: Layered architecture: Model -> Schema -> Repository -> Service -> Router
prerequisites.frontend_state: MappingsPage UI (Stitch design) already exists from Phase 10. Upload dialog needs building.
prerequisites.test_pattern: Integration tests with in-memory SQLite + httpx ASGI client (see test_connections.py)

tasks.description: Create Mapping SQLAlchemy model with MappingType enum, JSONB columns, versioning, FK to User
Create Alembic migration for mappings table + register model in env.py
Implement MappingRepository extending BaseRepository with filters
Implement MappingEngine service (pandas-based file parsing: CSV, Excel, JSON, XML + transformation logic)
Implement MappingService (business logic: upload, versioning, CRUD)
Create Mappings API router (CRUD + upload + versions) and register in api.py
Write integration tests for mappings API endpoints
Write unit tests for MappingEngine service (file parsing per format + transformations)
Build UploadMappingDialog frontend component (drag-drop, file type, name/type fields)
Wire frontend MappingsPage to real API endpoints (upload, download, delete)
